title: Elevated startup executes code from user-writable trust roots
recommendation: Install the elevated runtime under an admin-only ACL, fail closed before elevation if the launcher/interpreter/package is user-writable, and load only signed/hash-allow-listed external modules from an Administrator/SYSTEM-owned directory. Do not enable privileged imports from a per-user .env.

title: The event-ledger signing key shares the database's writable boundary
recommendation: Store the signing key behind an Administrator/SYSTEM-only ACL or protected non-exportable key service, fail closed rather than silently rotate a malformed existing key, and prove a DB writer cannot read or replace signing material.

title: The shared PowerShell substring denylist accepts destructive WMI actions
recommendation: Use a strict parsed command/parameter allow-list for generated containment, reject WMI/CIM/member invocation/pipelines/aliases/dynamic calls, validate both before staging and immediately before execution, and quarantine the existing unsafe playbooks.

title: Invalid model-generated YARA is activated without a compile gate
recommendation: Compile a temporary combined ruleset before atomic promotion, retain and restore a last-known-good ruleset, surface non-zero YARA exits as health failures, validate/escape technique metadata, and make self-test compile the live active rules.
